changes: one isolated settlement engine for wheel, golden squirrel and custom games
small per-user and per-game Firebase transactions instead of whole-database game transactions
automatic safe outcome filtering based on the actual game pool
idempotent hold, treasury accounting, payout finalization, refund and rollback protection
mobile squirrel layout and player-facing messages remain clean without treasury percentages or technical codes
new service-worker cache forces the corrected site files
